description: Generate perpendicular transects along the Danube River for a hydrological survey using the dataset located at /home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_10m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp. Create transects with a spacing of 20,000 meters and a length of 10,000 meters. Export the resulting transects as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/danube_transects.geojson.
